Package org.eventb.core.pog.state

Interface IEventActionTable

All Superinterfaces:
IPOGState, IState
All Known Subinterfaces:
IAbstractEventActionTable, IConcreteEventActionTable
All Known Implementing Classes:
AbstractEventActionTable, ConcreteEventActionTable, EventActionTable
public interface IEventActionTable extends IPOGState
Common protocol for event actions (of abstract and concrete events).
Since:
1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    containsAssignedVariable(FreeIdentifier variable)
    Returns whether the specified variable is in the frame of one of the actions.
    List<ISCAction>
    getActions()
    Returns the list of actions of the event.
    Collection<FreeIdentifier>
    getAssignedVariables()
    Returns the set of variables constituting the frame of the actions.
    List<Assignment>
    getAssignments()
    Returns the array of assignments corresponding to the actions of the event.
    List<ISCAction>
    getDetActions()
    Returns the array of deterministic actions of this event.
    List<BecomesEqualTo>
    getDetAssignments()
    Returns the array of deterministic assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions of the event.
    List<ISCAction>
    getNondetActions()
    Returns the array of non-deterministic actions of this event.
    List<Assignment>
    getNondetAssignments()
    Returns the array of non-deterministic assignments corresponding to the non-deterministic actions of the event.
    List<Predicate>
    getNondetPredicates()
    Returns the array of before-after predicates corresponding to the non-deterministic actions of the event.
    List<BecomesEqualTo>
    getPrimedDetAssignments()
    Returns the array of deterministic primed assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions of the event, i.e.

    Methods inherited from interface org.eventb.core.tool.IState

    getStateType, isImmutable, makeImmutable

  • Method Details

    • getActions

      List<ISCAction> getActions()
      Returns the list of actions of the event.

      The parsed and type-checked assignments corresponding to the actions can be retrieved via getAssignments().

      Returns:
      the list of actions of the event
      See Also:
      • getAssignments()

    • getAssignments

      List<Assignment> getAssignments()
      Returns the array of assignments corresponding to the actions of the event.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of actions returned by getActions().

      Returns:
      the array of assignments corresponding to the actions of the event

    • getAssignedVariables

      Collection<FreeIdentifier> getAssignedVariables()
      Returns the set of variables constituting the frame of the actions.
      Returns:
      the set of variables constituting the frame of the actions

    • containsAssignedVariable

      boolean containsAssignedVariable(FreeIdentifier variable)
      Returns whether the specified variable is in the frame of one of the actions.
      Parameters:
      variable - the variable to check
      Returns:
      whether the specified variable is in the frame of one of the actions

    • getNondetActions

      List<ISCAction> getNondetActions()
      Returns the array of non-deterministic actions of this event.

      The parsed and type-checked non-deterministic assignments corresponding to the non-deterministic actions can be retrieved via getNondetAssignments().

      Returns:
      the array of non-deterministic actions of this event

    • getNondetAssignments

      List<Assignment> getNondetAssignments()
      Returns the array of non-deterministic assignments corresponding to the non-deterministic actions of the event.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of non-deterministic actions returned by getNondetActions().

      Returns:
      the array of non-deterministic assignments corresponding to the non-deterministic actions of the event

    • getNondetPredicates

      List<Predicate> getNondetPredicates()
      Returns the array of before-after predicates corresponding to the non-deterministic actions of the event.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of non-deterministic actions returned by getNondetActions().

      Returns:
      the array of non-deterministic assignments corresponding to the non-deterministic actions of the event

    • getDetActions

      List<ISCAction> getDetActions()
      Returns the array of deterministic actions of this event.

      The parsed and type-checked deterministic assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions can be retrieved via getDetAssignments().

      Returns:
      the array of deterministic actions of this event

    • getDetAssignments

      List<BecomesEqualTo> getDetAssignments()
      Returns the array of deterministic assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions of the event.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of deterministic actions returned by getDetActions().

      Returns:
      the array of deterministic assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions of the event

    • getPrimedDetAssignments

      List<BecomesEqualTo> getPrimedDetAssignments()
      Returns the array of deterministic primed assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions of the event, i.e. if "x := E" is in the array of deterministic assignment it appears in this array as "x' := E". Note, that the resulting primed assignments are not valid Event-B formulas, but can only be used as substitutions.

      The indices of this list correspond to the indices of the list of deterministic actions returned by getDetActions().

      Returns:
      the array of deterministic primed assignments corresponding to the deterministic actions of the event
